this contract as the liquidationNotifier on LendingEngine.  LendingEngine calls ILiquidationNotifier.notifyLiquidation(borrower, debtRepaid, collateralSeized), which hits this contract. Governance can register or deregister handlers at any time. executeHooks dispatches to the registered handler inside a try/catch so a reverting hook never propagates to the caller (e.g. LendingEngine 7a21524537463bd237c85887ac4ca6de11bea263d39c","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://44bbcb7143424a09e42e3d033fd34ba36000c41740030089f475ecd2054a94bc","dweb:/ipfs/QmdL5BPdCyMgYQyh9rYJmv3pVQa1o4DERazYrdkaNKS55E"]},"node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/access/manager/IAuthority.sol":{"keccak256":"0x9c9a58dd831b9bb4a0ea47d96b53c13ab9a6e4270a518ea395b1424092fd74dc","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://d806b0c87fbcaf0cb827b51203b27f8289b13743aeadb5867fbbe041fcf87a92","dweb:/ipfs/QmfTEGiDGxKDaqBuBJ5wWJockGDrsEBZnW5S7UWrKhAxGc"]},"node_modules/@openzeppelin/contracts/utils/Context.sol":{"keccak256":"0x493033a8d1b176a037b2cc6a04dad01a5c157722049bbecf632ca876224dd4b2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6a708e8a5bdb1011c2c381c9a5cfd8a9a956d7d0a9dc1bd8bcdaf52f76ef2f12","dweb:/ipfs/Qmax9WHBnVsZP46ZxEMNRQpLQnrdE4dK8LehML1Py8FowF"]}},"version":1}

executeHooks(bytes32,bytes).details: data must be ABI-encoded as (address borrower, uint256 debtRepaid, uint256 collateralSeized, bytes32 correlationId).         If no handler is registered, returns silently (no revert).         If the handler reverts, emits HookFailed and continues.

params.data: ABI-encoded (address, uint256, uint256, bytes32) liquidation parameters.

isConsumingScheduledOp().details: Returns true only in the context of a delayed restricted call, at the moment that the scheduled operation is being consumed. Prevents denial of service for delayed restricted calls in the case that the contract performs attacker controlled calls.

notifyLiquidation(address,uint256,uint25.details: Dispatches to the DEFAULT_HOOK_TYPE handler via executeHooks.

params.collateralSeized: The amount of collateral transferred to the liquidator.
params.correlationId: A unique identifier linking this liquidation to its event trace.
params.debtRepaid: The amount of debt repaid by the liquidator.

setAuthority(address).details: Transfers control to a new authority. The caller must be the current authority.

DEFAULT_HOOK_TYPE().notice: Default hook type used by LendingEngine post-liquidation.

deregisterHook(bytes32).notice: Remove the hook handler for a given type.

executeHooks(bytes32,bytes).notice: Execute the registered hook for hookType with the given ABI-encoded data.

getHook(bytes32).notice: Returns the handler registered for hookType (address(0) if none).

registerHook(bytes32,address).notice: Register a hook handler for a given type (replaces any existing handler).
